summary: Concept phase completed successfully. Dispatched 3 agents sequentially: (1) concept-developer created story-concept.json with refined premise, 3 thematic pillars, 4 comp titles, 22-chapter estimate, and complete original name registry replacing all world-seed placeholders; (2) craft-profile-selector created craft-profile.json with 16 craft tools selected from the 26-tool toolbox, organized into structural (T6,T7,T8,T12,T13), tracking (T15,T18,T20,T23), thematic (T16,T25), and voice/tone (T5,T17,T24) groups plus T10 and T21; (3) concept-auditor passed both artifacts with verdict 'pass' — 0 critical, 0 major, 3 minor findings. No retry loops needed. Phase cleared to proceed to worldbuilding.
